accepted.reason: Monte Carlo probability estimation over nested dice-roll loops is a clean stochastic kernel.
Model copy/subsurface geometry transforms provide practical graphics data-path manipulation logic.
Indexed quicksort partitioning captures reusable in-place array and permutation update patterns.
Randomized-level skiplist upsert/find operations are high-value data-structure optimization targets.
Bidirectional quality-trim scan is a compact sequence-processing kernel used in bioinformatics pipelines.
ODE right-hand-side evaluation and stepping loops are strong scientific numeric workload examples.
Column-wise binary-search bin mapping is a robust preprocessing kernel for tree-based ML models.
Per-pixel grayscale conversion over RGB channels is a simple but useful image kernel.

skipped.reason: Event-loop handle lifecycle/callback glue is runtime-integration code rather than standalone conversion kernel.
SCSI device binding and ioctl-style wrapper logic is too system-specific for unpaired GRPO kernel focus.
